summary.macroSummary: Bitcoin approaches $79K for its highest weekly close since January with strong April performance, though technical analysts warn of bearish signals and exhaustion around $78K resistance. AI capex boom continues driving Nasdaq gains while geopolitical tensions persist with Iran war concerns and surging oil prices potentially fueling further stock rallies through earnings season.
summary.regimePressureReason: Risk assets (Bitcoin, AI-driven equities) showing strong momentum while oil surge from geopolitical tensions aligns with reflation narrative and equity bullishness.

keySignals.signal: Bitcoin nearing $79K weekly close represents strongest crypto risk-on signal since January
